subcodes.first_line: O thou who art set aglow with the Fire of the Love of God! Verily, I am in receipt of thy letter, and my breast is dilated by its contents
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
